actions.description: Dismiss cookie consent banner if present
actions.javascript: () => { const btn = document.querySelector('button.ui-cookie-consent-btn, .cc-btn.cc-dismiss, button[aria-label="Okay"], a.cc-btn'); if (btn) { btn.click(); return 'dismissed'; } return 'none'; }

actions.description: Truncate searchTerm to max 5 words (Handelsregister keyword limit)
actions.javascript: () => { const term = '${searchTerm}'; const words = term.split(/\s+/); return words.length > 5 ? words.slice(0, 5).join(' ') : term; }

actions.description: Enter company name into search field (max 5 words)
Extract search results from first page
actions.javascript: () => { const results = []; const tables = document.querySelectorAll('table.ui-panelgrid.ui-widget'); for (const table of tables) { const oddRow = table.querySelector('tr.ui-panelgrid-odd, tr.ui-widget-content:nth-child(2)'); if (!oddRow) continue; const cells = oddRow.querySelectorAll('td'); if (cells.length < 3) continue; const nameCell = oddRow.querySelector('td.paddingBottom20Px'); const officeCell = oddRow.querySelector('td.sitzSuchErgebnisse'); const companyName = nameCell ? nameCell.textContent.replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim() : ''; const registeredOffice = officeCell ? officeCell.textContent.replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim() : ''; let status = ''; for (let i = 0; i < cells.length; i++) { if (cells[i].classList.contains('sitzSuchErgebnisse') && i + 1 < cells.length) { status = cells[i + 1].textContent.replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); break; } } const headerBold = table.querySelector('span.fontWeightBold'); const registrationId = headerBold ? headerBold.textContent.replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim() : ''; if (companyName) { results.push({ companyName, registeredOffice, status, registrationId }); } } return JSON.stringify(results); }

() => { const paginatorText = document.querySelector('span.ui-paginator-current'); if (!paginatorText) return JSON.stringify({ siteTotalCount: -1, currentPage: 1, totalPages: 1 }); const text = paginatorText.textContent.trim(); const match = text.match(/(\d+)-(\d+)\s+of\s+(\d+)/i); if (match) { const start = parseInt(match[1]); const end = parseInt(match[2]); const total = parseInt(match[3]); const perPage = end - start + 1; const totalPages = perPage > 0 ? Math.ceil(total / perPage) : 1; const currentPage = perPage > 0 ? Math.ceil(end / perPage) : 1; return JSON.stringify({ siteTotalCount: total, currentPage, totalPages }); } return JSON.stringify({ siteTotalCount: -1, currentPage: 1, totalPages: 1 }); }

actions.description: Detect exceeded-hits warning (store as data, do NOT throw)
actions.pattern: maximum number of 100 hits has been exceeded
actions.javascript: () => { const el = document.querySelector('div.warning.displayBlock, .ui-outputpanel.warning.displayBlock'); if (!el) return null; return el.textContent.replace(/[\u00d7\u2715]/g, '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); }

actions.description: Save current paginator text before clicking next
Wait for AJAX pagination to refresh results (paginator text changes)
actions.javascript: () => { const el = document.querySelector('span.ui-paginator-current'); if (!el) return false; const currentText = el.textContent.trim(); return currentText !== '' && currentText !== '${previousPaginatorText}'; }

actions.description: Extract page results after AJAX refresh
actions.javascript: () => { const results = []; const tables = document.querySelectorAll('table.ui-panelgrid.ui-widget'); for (const table of tables) { const oddRow = table.querySelector('tr.ui-panelgrid-odd, tr.ui-widget-content:nth-child(2)'); if (!oddRow) continue; const cells = oddRow.querySelectorAll('td'); if (cells.length < 3) continue; const nameCell = oddRow.querySelector('td.paddingBottom20Px'); const officeCell = oddRow.querySelector('td.sitzSuchErgebnisse'); const companyName = nameCell ? nameCell.textContent.replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim() : ''; const registeredOffice = officeCell ? officeCell.textContent.replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim() : ''; let status = ''; for (let i = 0; i < cells.length; i++) { if (cells[i].classList.contains('sitzSuchErgebnisse') && i + 1 < cells.length) { status = cells[i + 1].textContent.replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); break; } } const headerBold = table.querySelector('span.fontWeightBold'); const registrationId = headerBold ? headerBold.textContent.replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim() : ''; if (companyName) { results.push({ companyName, registeredOffice, status, registrationId }); } } return JSON.stringify(results); }
